# kemp_replace_body_rule (Resource)

System-level rule that substitutes within response bodies. Attach via `kemp_virtual_service_rule` (responsebody direction).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_replace_body_rule" "redact_internal_hostname" {
  name        = "redact-internal-hostname"
  pattern     = "internal\\.example\\.local"
  replacement = "[redacted]"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `pattern` (String)
- `replacement` (String)

### Optional

- `only_on_flag` (Number)
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number)
